name: nanopoter
description: Four houses compete for glory. Magic is status. A dark lord rises at the horizon.
theme: magical academy, house rivalry, dark magic, coming of age, chosen one
opening_events: A new year begins at the school of magic. The Sorting Hat has spoken. The houses eye each other warily.
Dark rumors travel the corridors: something ancient stirs in the Forbidden Forest.
The headmaster watches from above. Not all students will survive this year.

agents.name: Harry
agents.goal: protect my friends and stop the dark lord

agents.name: Hermione
agents.goal: master every branch of magic and prove my worth

agents.name: Ron
agents.goal: stand by my friends and prove I'm not just a sidekick

agents.name: Draco
agents.goal: restore my family's honor and claim power in Slytherin

agents.name: Snape
agents.goal: protect the students while hiding my true allegiance

agents.name: Dumbledore
agents.goal: guide the chosen one without revealing the full truth

agents.name: Voldemort
agents.goal: return to power and destroy all who oppose me

agents.name: Luna
agents.goal: see the truth others refuse to see

agents.name: Neville
agents.goal: find my courage and become who I was meant to be

agents.name: Bellatrix
agents.goal: serve my lord with absolute devotion and destroy his enemies

agents.name: Hagrid
agents.goal: protect the creatures and keep the students safe

agents.name: Ginny
agents.goal: prove I'm more than someone's little sister

metadata.report_style: magical academy yearbook with house colors
